name: 75p multilabel cross_attn maxf1 (correct)
short_description: multilabel cross_attn baseline, max f1 chosen
long_description:
MODEL_CONFIG = {
    "architecture": "cross_attention_multilabel",
    "input_dim": 2560,
    "model_dim": 256,
    "num_heads": 8,
    "response_layers": 1,
    "feedforward_dim": 1024,
    "dropout": 0.2,
    "num_types": 5,
    "max_response_length": 512,
    "max_context_tokens": 512,
}

LEARNING_RATE = 1e-4
WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-2
MAX_GRAD_NORM = 1.0
HALLUCINATION_POS_WEIGHT = 2.5
TYPE_POS_WEIGHTS = [2.5, 3.7, 10.0, 8.0, 5.9]
BOUNDARY_POS_WEIGHT = 10.0
TYPE_LOSS_WEIGHT = 1.0
BOUNDARY_LOSS_WEIGHT = 0.1
SCHEDULER_FACTOR = 0.5
SCHEDULER_PATIENCE = 2
MIN_LEARNING_RATE = 1e-6
EARLY_STOPPING_PATIENCE = 6
MIN_IMPROVEMENT = 1e-4
